display_text: Tumbler's Toy, Tier 2: Neutral item providing +60 mana and a Vault ability that propels your hero forward 300 units. The item gets disabled for 3 seconds if its owner receives damage from a player source, limiting its use in combat. Stats: Vault CD: 15s, Leap Speed: 1300, Leap Acceleration: 20000, Disable on Damage: 3s.
